name: Cream Cheese Frosting
recipeIngredient: 6 ounces cream cheese, softened to room temperature
3 tablespoons butter, softened to room temperature
1 pound box of confectioners sugar, sifted
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, beat the cream cheese and the butter until light and fluffy.
2. Gradually beat in the confectioners sugar.
3. Add the vanilla, sour cream, and orange rind until blended.
